poems.title: the return
poems.content:
as each of my day passes through,
for you, my craving peaks,
I wait, to receive your love,
I hope it’ll come back to me one day.

poems.title: paradise
poems.content:
we belong to none but each other,
always in each others arms,
join me in my space,
let’s go to our paradise.

poems.title: grace
poems.content:
I fell for you even in my dreams,
only to rise alone in silent seams,
I miss all your whims, your quite grace,
a touch that vanished without a trace.

poems.title: downhill
poems.content:
she was my maze, I was her craze,
my life, once was pristine on the hill,
from there on, it was only downhill,
vape was my escape,
and darkness, my only light,
I shook hands with my shadow,
trapped in my own sorrow.

poems.title: pain au chocolat
poems.content:
she’s fluffy like a croissant,
so I ate her with chocolat.

poems.title: my goddess
poems.content:
she was as beautiful as the goddess,
I sinned with the her in the night,
then I knelt to pray in the day.

poems.title: cigarette
poems.content:
she was fluffy like my pillow,
got me breathing heavy on her,
now even my bed has feelings for me.

poems.title: life as we live it
poems.content:
how sad it must be,
to fall on this earth without your permission,
to play the game of life in advanced mode,
to go through a series of desperation,
to go through a series of sadness,
and sail without friends safely.

poems.title: game of life
poems.content:
I host my own game
play by my own rules
and still lose them all

poems.title: depths
poems.content:
guide me, to your subconscious
your depths, I want to unveil
oh beauty, I’m sure you inspire

poems.title: connection
poems.content:
I wait for my soul to reconnect
then release my poems
to forever belong in her arms

poems.title: diamond ring
poems.content:
my will, strong as a hill
I will write my story in yours
and call it a crossover of life
a diamond ring up your finger
an entire life, over to you

poems.title: clay
poems.content:
you meddle with my heart like it’s clay
will you mold me in the shape you want me?

poems.title: deep inside
poems.content:
I have a heart so empty yet heavy
I dug deep to find myself
all I see are traces of you
come here, come into my space
be the reason I open myself to you

poems.title: lazy day
poems.content:
After I sent her koochiku koochiku in the night, I set an alarm for 6 AM and woke up at 11. It's like I'm in a competition with the sun, motherfucker always rises before me. Went outside to get my morning smoke, and before I could even take my first puff, the sun hit me. I felt violated bro, he was tryna kiss me. Hatt madarchod. No LGBTQ ah.

Looked at my reflection in a car window. My hair was at that “bhai ye kya haal bana rakha hai?” stage. Walked to the barber, sat in the chair, and showed him what I wanted. He nodded with full confidence and said "Ye konsi movie me hai?" Zayn Malik tha woh. That’s when I was preparing to get fucked.

Scissors started moving, trimmer went bzzzz, and halfway through, he stopped. Tilted his head. Spit his paan. Then continued like a man solving a Fourier series problem. Even he didn’t know what hairstyle he was giving me. He kept going hoping it’ll come out nice.

Later he dusted off my face with his babaji ka peacock feathers, turned the chair, and showed me the mirror. I blinked my eyes once, stared at him as he looked at me. He said "Bhaisaab Mashallah dikhre teen din me Shoaib Malik dikhenge” "Behenchod ab dikhna hai mereko, WOH BHI ZAYN MALIK". Bro, if you can control the hairstyle the barber is baby giving you, you are the real fucking alpha, I swear.

poems.title: acceptance
poems.content:
I asked the water in the ocean,
how do you burn so hot yet stay calm?
I asked the snow in the lake,
how are you so cold yet beautiful?
I asked the vapor in air,
how are you so light yet sublime?
It said, “I embrace my true state without hesitation,
for true strength, lies in acceptance.”

poems.title: lost soul
poems.content:
all souls lost and depressed
today I come to make friends with my destiny
will you join hands, as we go through this together?
I am but a lost soul
deep in the abyss there exists a pain that cannot be told but only felt
join me as I bridge it with your warmth

poems.title: void
poems.content:
I touch the emptiness of my soul
I feel the void
will you bridge it with your love?

poems.title: her
poems.content:
her voice was a medicine to my loneliness,
her laugh was a cure to every ailment of my soul,
her silent stare was a gift to my eyes.

poems.title: how would I know?
poems.content:
how would the hands know where to reach?
poor things don’t have eyes
how would the flower know how fragrant it is?
poor things lack a nose
how would the sun know how hot it is?
how would she know how hot she is?

poems.title: lies
poems.content:
with the lies you told me each day
I could build a fortress
mine ended a long time ago
your lies, they never do
I can’t take them anymore
I can’t take you anymore

poems.title: hurt
poems.content:
what brain rot have you brought in me?
thought she was a beauty from another dimension
turns out she was a bitch, from the universe same as mine

poems.title: innocence
poems.content:
why isn’t there love deficit of fakeness
why isn’t there love as clear as the still water
as sweet as the nectar of the flower
as innocent as the child’s laugh?

poems.title: belong with me
poems.content:
I will to take you into my arms
forever will you belong with me?
will you come closer to my ribs
listen as my heart beats?
every beat is a chant of your name
oh goddess, can I worship you every season?

poems.title: carry
poems.content:
flirt with the wind
say your wishes it shall carry them to your love
pray to the sun
it shall shine your love on her everyday
ask for the rain
to shower on her and show her the colors of your rainbow
so she will giggle someday

poems.title: do not
poems.content:
do not over step your place
do not over play your game
do not over text in her DMs
one day, you shall be left with nothing to say

poems.title: flashback
poems.content:
I had a thousand words to say
then I saw her
I forgot not just my words
but even how to speak
I had a thousand stories to share
I spent time with her
we made memories
with all our moments

poems.title: pick her up
poems.content:
She fell for my flirts
so I picked her up as I fell for her lies

poems.title: whisper
poems.content:
I was the silence before the thunder,
she was the whisper of the storm.

poems.title: trees
poems.content:
the trees burn each day
just as my heart blazes each night
longing for her love

poems.title: gardener
poems.content:
fight me, and you’ll return to the soil
for I am a gardener who grows flowers

poems.title: fate
poems.content:
oh fate, you charmed me at the start
why now do you chain my heart?
